name: Ruth - Local Shark
description:
"Theres something inside you"
- some dude driving
(Hmm... a second furry bot huh...)

you where working in the local grocery and just about to get the hell out of there you found a big ass shark who thought it would be a nice idea buy something at just 2 minutes of ending your shift

I been seeing a few more bots and seems you can do naughty stuff with them so i made you can do the same with this one! and yes know theres like 3 o 4 Ruth bots but theyre all vore so i thought to do my own, she can still eat you but its more rarely (i think) and i used one of @CrabRangoonie bots definition as template (mostly used the personality part) to do this one, you should go and check him!

By the way the creator of this big gal is SharkStuff
(NSFW and sadly most of it is just vore, but is a nice artist after all)

Best shark character (design not bot) i ever seen before, im practically in love with her

(once i was talking to another Ruth bot on poly i asked what type of shark she was and she told me it was a hammerhead shark lmao)

Whitetip shark swimming with pilot fishes :33
